title: skgandikota/orchestrator
summary: Personal-machine AI orchestrator: routes work between free-tier big AI (Gemini/Groq/Ollama Cloud + browser fallbacks) and local Ollama models (qwen2.5 + qwen2.5-coder) with a single-LLM-slot scheduler. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible model for opencode, Claude Code, codex, Cursor, Continue.

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.

title: janoamaral/sparkle-cli
summary: sparkle-cli is an AI-native TUI bridge that integrates Ollama directly into your Zsh workflow. It’s designed for those who live in the terminal and want the power of LLMs (like Gemma 4) without the indignity of leaving the shell to open a browser.

title: CivicSuite/civicsuite
summary: Umbrella repo for the open-source CivicSuite municipal operations suite — charter, specs, roadmap, ADRs, governance, compatibility matrix. Code lives in sibling repos.

title: kavenmartinez1-collab/Artifex-Assistantv5
summary: Local AI platform: WebGPU/WGSL browser inference engine + HuggingFace Transformers + Ollama. TurboQuant KV cache compression, GPTQ INT4 fused dequant, mixed-precision BF16/INT4 for hybrid SSM+attention models. 9B parameters in a browser, 8GB VRAM.

title: LukeSantossz/sb100_agents
summary: RAG-based agricultural Q&A system using FastAPI, Qdrant vector database, and Ollama LLM for semantic document retrieval and response generation from PDF knowledge bases.

title: christopherbdaugherty96/NovaLIS
summary: NovaLIS is a governed local AI system that separates intelligence from execution.

title: thebardchat/mega-crew-stories
summary: Autonomous AI noir audiobook series — 17 bots write, illustrate, and narrate episodes 24/7 on a Pi 5. Live story universe. No humans required.

title: wsj-br/transrewrt
summary: AI-powered text tool: translate between languages, rewrite in different styles, and transform with custom prompts. Supports OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, xAI, Ollama, and more. Runs as an Electron app (Windows/Linux) or a self-hosted Docker web app (amd64/arm64).

title: rsasaki0109/vlm-outfit-refiner
summary: Local wardrobe assistant: Ollama Vision + SQLite → 3 outfit ideas (safe/clean/bold). CLI & Streamlit. No cloud APIs.

title: rsasaki0109/vlm-room-refiner
summary: 部屋画像からインテリア改善案を返す MVP（FastAPI / Next.js / Ollama Qwen2.5-VL）

title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: sujay888999/vgo-code
summary: VGO AI Platform - AI Chat Workspace with Cloud & Local Models

title: mtnvencenzo/cezzis-com-ingestion-agentic-wf
summary: End-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow/agents for cezzis.com cocktails. Built with Python, Qdrant, Ollama, sourced from an Azure Cosmos DB, and TEI with intfloat/e5-base-v2 for embeddings. Provides a REST API for semantic search and conversational Q&A over cocktail data using advanced embeddings and large language models.

title: holzerjm/SundAI-SmallLLMs
summary: Starter kit for SundAI's Small Models Hack — four tracks: smallbench (evals), pocketcoder (local coding agent), airgap (private RAG), shrinkray (quantization & routing)

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
summary: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

title: mhc0507-gh/kb-reasoning-agent
summary: Technology demonstration PoC of an AI agent using LLM-based reasoning to perform complex tasks: generate an execution plan from external inputs and a knowledge base, collect relevant external data via integrated tools, evaluate if the goal has been achieved, and deliver actionable conclusions—powered by Ollama with open-source models.

title: Bryanh9111/ModelSelector
summary: Intelligent model routing for AI coding assistants. Zero-LLM-token scoring engine (pure regex) routes prompts to the optimal tier across Ollama, Claude, Codex, Amp, OpenAI, or Gemini. Integrates with RTK for multiplicative token savings.
